brand.name: Auré Casa
brand.tagline: Objetos para os detalhes que transformam a casa.
brand.perception: Contemporary, refined, warm, editorial, accessible-premium, minimalist but not cold. Brazilian, urban, tasteful, Pinterest-worthy.

rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#2C2825] leading-tight

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/85 border-b border-[#E6E4E0]
header.nav_links: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-[#2C2825] hover:text-[#C88E77] transition-colors

buttons.primary: bg-[#2C2825] text-[#F9F8F6] px-8 py-4 rounded-full text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#C88E77] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2C2825] text-[#2C2825] px-8 py-4 rounded-full text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#F1EFEB] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-[#2C2825] underline decoration-1 underline-offset-4 hover:text-[#C88E77] transition-colors

product_card.image: object-cover w-full h-full group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out
product_card.title: text-lg font-medium text-[#2C2825] font-serif

category_card.container: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl group cursor-pointer aspect-square
category_card.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-black/10 group-hover:bg-black/20 transition-colors duration-500
category_card.title: text-3xl text-white font-serif

hero.description: A beautiful ivory architectural curve in a contemporary living room

product_spotlight.description: White ceramic vase with delicate branch, beautiful editorial light

editorial_blocks.description: Simple elegant scene with a wooden table, teapot, and chair
White vase on top of table

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the entire application uses the Ivory/Warm Off-White background #F9F8F6 (Areia). Do not use pure white backgrounds except for specific product cards or isolated surfaces.
Inject Google Fonts 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' into the index.html or root layout.
Do not use Shadcn card component styling with standard borders for product cards; use the custom flat design described in 'product_card'.
Hero section should be an immersive editorial layout, potentially split-screen or featuring the hero image large with minimal overlay.

Add to Cart, Wishlist, and Checkout flows should feel completely seamless, using slide-out drawers (e.g. Shadcn Sheet customized with rounded corners) for the mini-cart instead of full-page redirects where possible.
Admin dashboard can use a slightly more standard Shadcn layout, but tint the background to match the brand (#F9F8F6) and use the #9CA896 (Verde Sálvia) for positive metrics.
Avoid generic 'e-commerce' aesthetics. No bright red sale tags; use muted Terracota (#C88E77) for accents.
